suggestions.topic: PTC fix decision for ePBS DevNet 1
suggestions.rationale: PRs 4992 and 5020 required review with decision deadline Monday March 24 (ACDT). This fix forces DevNet 1 and is the only hard fork requirement blocking Glamsterdam DevNet 0 mid-April target.

suggestions.topic: ePBS DevNet 0 status and critical bug fixes
suggestions.rationale: Multiple critical issues from ACDC #176: Lighthouse exit processing breaks chain, Prysm FCU payload hash issues, Nimbus/Teku/Grandine connectivity problems. DevNet 0 needs stabilization before mid-April DevNet 1 target.

ACDC #176 identified that 4788 will have gaps for empty payloads under ePBS. Action item to contact Lido, Rocketpool, EigenLayer on impact and analyze proof complexity. Critical for ePBS production readiness.

ACDC #173 established that ePBS cannot ship without partial slot proofs in all clients. ACDC #174 showed DevNet with Lighthouse/Prism only. Teku, Lodestar, Nimbus implementations remain incomplete despite being critical blocker.
Mid-April target (before Interop) requires resolving PTC fix, stabilizing current DevNet 0, and ensuring 2-3 clients are production-ready. Needs explicit go/no-go decision.

ACDC #176 showed significant blob performance gains with SSZ transport but debate on scope: ship immediately vs full Engine API redesign. ELs want semantic fixes (FCU bundling, deterministic validity). Requires coordination with ACDE.
ACDC #176 stated non-headliner window opens after EL headliner decision (expected March 26 ACDE). Need to establish timeline and process for CL-side proposals like EIP-8148 (custom sweep threshold).

ACDC #174 showed Blob DevNet Zero stable for 2 weeks with Lighthouse nearly done, Prism in review, Lodestar debugging. Can deploy pre-Amsterdam with backwards compatibility. Status update on remaining implementations.
